text: Blue flamethrower - allows the fire master to set a target on fire (if the battle is underwater, it can do serious damage to the enemy).
Six-shot fireballs - the fire master fires six projectiles every second.
Electric discharge - strikes an entity with lightning.
$(o)Condition:$() ≥3 burning blocks within 16 blocks or in the Nether.
Blue Flame Tongues: Every 3rd hit in a 3-sec combo ignites target for 5 sec.
Blue Flame Protection: Immune to fire, lava, and magma damage.
